summary.key_theme: Cloudflare 憑藉與 Coinbase 的 AI 支付合作、SentinelOne 的資安整合以及 Mastercard 的戰略聯盟，展現強勁的成長動能與市場擴張力。

bullish.title: Cloudflare shares are trading higher following reports suggesting that Coinbase is seeking a stablecoin deal with the company to power AI agent payments.
bullish.reason: 與 Coinbase 合作開發 AI 代理支付系統，為 Cloudflare 開闢了全新的金融科技營收渠道，市場反應正面，推動股價顯著上漲。

bullish.title: Cloudflare: Right Time To Dive In As Growth Accelerates, Stablecoin Opportunity (Rating Upgrade)
bullish.reason: 分析師指出公司營收成長率維持在 30% 以上，符合「Rule of 40」指標，且穩定幣機會進一步提升了長期成長潛力，給予評級調升。

bullish.title: SentinelOne and Cloudflare Expand Partnership to Deliver Real-Time Threat Detection and Automated Response for Enterprises
bullish.reason: 透過整合 Cloudflare Logpush 與 SentinelOne 的 AI 安全平台，強化了企業級威脅偵測能力，有助於鞏固市場地位並提升客戶黏著度。

bullish.title: Cloudflare (NET), Mastercard (MA) Partner to Expand Cyber Defense for Small Businesses and Critical Infrastructure
bullish.reason: 與 Mastercard 建立合作關係，針對中小企業提供網路防禦，此舉有助於擴大 Cloudflare 在非科技領域的市佔率。

bullish.title: Cloudflare Surges 8%: NVIDIA’s AI Boom Is Coming for the Edge and This Stock Is Ready
bullish.reason: 市場看好 Cloudflare 在邊緣運算領域的佈局，認為其能受惠於 NVIDIA 引領的 AI 基礎設施需求爆發。

bearish.title: Cloudflare (NET) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
bearish.reason: 股價出現回調，表現弱於大盤，主要反映短期獲利了結賣壓，而非公司基本面惡化。

bearish.title: Cloudflare's Stablecoin: A Real Catalyst or Short-Term Hype?
bearish.reason: 市場對與 Coinbase 的合作持審慎態度，質疑其是否為長期營收驅動力，或僅是短期炒作題材。

neutral.title: Micron, Carvana, Cloudflare, Comcast And Barrick Mining: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
neutral.reason: 僅為市場盤點類新聞，提及 Cloudflare 受到投資人關注，未對股價產生實質影響。

neutral.title: Renewed Park City Bid Puts Focus On Vail Resorts Capital Choices
neutral.reason: 報導內容聚焦於執行長 Matthew Prince 的個人投資行為，與 Cloudflare 本身業務無直接關聯。
